summary: Customer Experience Redesign Testing - All core features working. Fixed babel-metadata-plugin crash that was blocking frontend compilation. Customer Home dashboard, Bottom Tab Bar (5 tabs), Case Detail page with all sections (Overview, Messages, Shared, Payments, Timeline), and Case List all functioning correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed babel-metadata-plugin.js crash at line 916 - added try/catch around traverse() call to handle null AST edge cases
All data-testid attributes properly implemented for testing
Bottom Tab Bar correctly hides on case detail pages (has own sticky CTA)
ChatBot correctly hides on case detail and customer home pages
RM Selection API returns 3 RMs as expected
Sticky 'Message Your RM' button correctly shows on non-messages tabs and hides on messages tab
context_for_next_testing_agent: Customer experience redesign complete. Key pages: /home (CustomerHome), /my-cases (CustomerCaseList), /my-cases/:caseId (CustomerCaseDetail). Bottom Tab Bar has 5 tabs: Home, Explore, My Case, Messages, Profile. Case Detail has 5 sections: Overview, Messages, Shared, Payments, Timeline. ChatBot and BottomTabBar hide on case detail pages. Fixed babel-metadata-plugin crash by adding try/catch around traverse() call.

features_verified.Customer Home (/home): PASS - Loads with greeting, active case hero, quick actions, RM info
features_verified.Bottom Tab Bar (5 tabs): PASS - Home, Explore, My Case, Messages, Profile all present
features_verified.Case Detail Overview: PASS - Case info, RM card, quick actions all present
features_verified.Case Detail Messages: PASS - Chat interface with compose area working
features_verified.Case Detail Shared: PASS - Shared items displayed with response capability
features_verified.Case Detail Payments: PASS - Payment info and history displayed
features_verified.Sticky Message RM button: PASS - Shows on non-messages tabs, hides on messages tab
features_verified.Customer Case List (/my-cases): PASS - Shows cases with proper cards
features_verified.Bottom tab bar hides on case detail: PASS - Not rendered on case detail pages
features_verified.ChatBot hides on case detail and home: PASS - Not rendered on these pages
